discoveries.insight_preview:
What surprised me about unusual ecosystems:

The deeper I looked, the more I realized that our assumptions about unusual ecosystems are often backwards. 
What seems like a limitation is often a featur

The most counterintuitive insight about human-AI collaboration isn't about what AI can do—it's about what it reveals about us. We've been looking at this relationship backwards. The common assumption is that AI will make us more machine-like: efficient, productive, optimized. But the emerging research reveals the opposite pattern.
